paper.title: Layer-Isolated Evaluation: Gating the Deterministic Scaffold of a Production LLM Agent with a No-LLM, Regression-Locked Test Harness

checks: The downloaded object is a readable PDF 1.7 document; pdfinfo reports the exact title, all three authors, 12 pages, and 400928 bytes.
The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from title and abstract through the conclusion, reproducibility statement, complete references, and manuscript page 12.

The extraction preserves the paper's count reconciliation: 238 locked-baseline cases comprise 225 pure per-layer cases plus 13 separately run L1_legacy cases, while 30 collected live-only variants are skipped in pure mode.
The immutable arXiv source archive is readable and contains five members: 00README.json, fig_localization.pdf, main.bbl, main.tex, and refs.bib.
The arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
warnings: The file utility reports a 9-page PDF document while pdfinfo, arXiv metadata, and extracted manuscript page boundaries report 12 pages; the index uses pdfinfo and verified manuscript boundaries.

official_release_search.paper_link_evidence: The immutable v1 manuscript and complete arXiv source name a repository and internal paths but provide no project, code, data, repository, or supplemental-artifact URL. The named paths are eval/baselines/baseline_layers.json, eval/experiments/p2_regression_injection.py, p2_injection_results.json, p2_injection_matrix.json, make_paper_figures.py, and apps/eval/lumi_eval/test_layer_cases.py.

official_release_search.search_result_boundary: Search results found the immutable arXiv record, third-party paper pages, and the plausible corresponding-author GitHub profile. None of the profile's 175 public repository names/descriptions identifies this paper, arXiv ID, or layer-isolated ordering-agent harness, and the five plausible repository trees contain none of the manuscript's named paths. This records absence at acquisition time, not proof that no release exists or will later appear.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF and source archive, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified readable coverage through the final page, and recorded the current absence of a verifiable author-owned empirical release. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, release audit, experiment reproduction, endorsement of the paper's interpretation, or evidence of stochastic end-to-end reliability, production consequence, professional validity, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use the immutable v1 PDF/text/source archive for the queued deep review. Recheck the corresponding author's public repositories and any paper revision before finalizing. Preserve the release ceiling: paper tables and prose are locally verifiable, but the claimed harness, cases, baselines, tenant fixtures, injected mutations, raw records, and analysis scripts are not currently available for independent conformance or reproduction.
local_storage_note: The PDF and arXiv source archive are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, metadata, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
